news_angle: Astronomers have solved the decades-long mystery behind Saturn’s twisted magnetic field, providing new insights into the planet’s unique magnetic dynamics.
why_this_is_news: This discovery resolves a long-standing scientific puzzle about Saturn’s magnetism, a key aspect for understanding giant planet physics and magnetic fields in our solar system, making it a fresh and significant breakthrough.
specific_action: scientists just figured out why it is twisted
